Updated meeting notes — 0 action item(s), 0 reminder(s).

meetingNotes.rawNotes:
**Product: SaaSify**

The customer expressed interest in evaluating **SaaSify** through a 30-day free trial to simplify marketplace sales and private offer management. They want to assess features including private offer creation, approval workflows, CRM integration, reporting, and dashboard insights. The discussion covered AWS Marketplace support, user onboarding, role-based access, and SSO configuration. The customer plans to involve sales, operations, and finance teams during the trial. Success will be measured by creating and managing private offers efficiently, reducing manual effort, and validating integrations with existing systems. The SaaSify team will provision the trial environment, provide onboarding sessions, share documentation, and collect feedback throughout the evaluation period.

dynamicFields.label: Implementation / go-live
dynamicFields.value: onboarding, role-based access, and SSO configuration

meetingNotes.rawNotes: Had an initial discussion with the client regarding pricing and commercial terms for the SaaS solution. The client expressed interest in moving forward but raised concerns about budget constraints and requested information on available discounts. We discussed their expected user base, subscription preferences, and implementation timeline to better understand their requirements. Based on the preliminary details shared, we informed the client that volume-based and annual commitment discounts may be available. Agreed to review the requirements internally and provide a customized pricing proposal with applicable discount options. Follow-up discussion scheduled after the client reviews the commercial proposal.
